sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29728" key="dwdeka/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκά-παις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">παιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n29728.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with twelve children</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λοχείη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.132</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
